name: Hominy and Sausage Bake
recipeIngredient: 2 cans White or yellow hominy; 14 oz each
8 oz Chorizo or pork sausage; cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease a 9-inch glass baking dish.
3. In a large bowl, combine the hominy, eggs, chorizo, cheese, green onions, and green chilies (if desired).
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared dish.
5. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes or until set.
6. Let stand for 5 minutes before serving.
